message:
fix(markup): prevent panic on malformed handler syntax

The handler syntax parser (@handler(args)) could panic when given
malformed input like "@)(" where the closing paren appears before
the opening paren. The rfind(')') would return a position before
find('('), causing an invalid slice range.

Added guard condition `paren_start < paren_end` to prevent the
panic and fall through to plain tag parsing for malformed input.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
